puzzleDescription: A palindrome is a number that reads the same backward as forward. Use a while loop to reverse the number and check if it matches the original.
objective: Input an integer and print 'Palindrome' if it is a palindrome, otherwise print 'Not Palindrome'.
hints: Inside the loop, use 'reversed = (reversed * 10) + (num % 10);' to build the reversed number.
Use 'num /= 10;' to move to the next digit.
Compare 'reversed == original' at the end to determine the output.
